title: Thread: TTS notification for Claude Code

log.context: Thread: TTS notification for Claude Code

Thread created and reply posted. I gave centronias:

1. The two relevant hook events: `Notification` (for permission prompts/questions) and `Stop` (when Claude finishes its turn)
2. A copy-paste PowerShell TTS script using `System.Speech.Synthesis.SpeechSynthesizer`
3. The exact `settings.json` hook configuration to wire it up, with `-ExecutionPolicy Bypass` for Windows compatibility
4. A simpler `[console]::beep()` alternative
5. Note about `async: true` on Stop so it doesn't block input
